summary: Comprehensive testing of POS bug fixes: 1) Sale page crash (Objects are not valid as React child) - FIXED, sales complete successfully. 2) Daily session open button - WORKING. 3) French translation for cash box names - WORKING. All features tested and verified functional.

issues: Transaction descriptions show Arabic cash box name (الصندوق النقدي) even in French mode - this is expected for historical data

passed_tests.feature: Sale success dialog with invoice number
Cash boxes French translation - Cash Management

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Sale completion works without React crash error
✓ CashBoxResponse model in backend now includes name_fr field
✓ init_cash_boxes updates existing boxes with name_fr
✓ Frontend DashboardPage and CashManagementPage correctly display French names when language is French
✓ Daily session flow working: open → sell → close
seed_data_creation: Used existing products (samsung, cable samsung luna) for sale testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) Sale page no longer crashes when confirming sale, 2) Daily session buttons work correctly, 3) French translation for cash boxes working in Dashboard and Cash Management pages. Cash boxes have both Arabic (name) and French (name_fr) labels. Sale tested with existing product 'cable samsung luna' - sale created successfully with invoice number INV-20260209-0003.

french_translation.dashboard_display: PASS - Caisse, Compte bancaire, Portefeuille électronique
french_translation.cash_management_display: PASS - All 4 boxes show French names

sale_page_crash.original_error: Objects are not valid as a React child
sale_page_crash.evidence: Sale completed successfully with invoice INV-20260209-0003

daily_session_buttons.evidence: Close session button visible and clickable, session shows correct status

french_cash_box_names.original_issue: Arabic names shown in French mode
french_cash_box_names.evidence: French names (Caisse, Compte bancaire, etc.) display correctly in both Dashboard and Cash Management
